Bash("/c/Program Files/R/R-4.4.3/bin/Rscript.exe" -e "
library\(DBI\)
library\(RSQLite\)

# Connect to database
db_path <- Sys.getenv\(''R_DB_PATH''\)
conn <- dbConnect\(RSQLite::SQLite\(\), db_path\)

# Get USD rates
query <- ""SELECT date, toCHF FROM ConvertToUSD 
          WHERE currency = ''USD'' 
          AND date IN \(20251209, 20251210, 20251211, 20251212, 20251215, 20251216, 20251218, 20251219, 20251222, 20251223, 20251224, 20251229, 20251230\)
          ORDER BY date""

rates <- dbGetQuery\(conn, query\)
dbDisconnect\(conn\)

print\(rates\)
")

Bash("/c/Program Files/R/R-4.4.3/bin/Rscript.exe" -e "
library\(Tbasics\)
# ONDS Call, S=12.35, K=18, bid=0.77, DTE~50
cat\(''Test with getImpliedVol:\\n''\)
iv = tryCatch\(
  getImpliedVol\(type=''Call'', S=12.35, K=18, r=0.04, DTE=50, div=0, price=0.77, asset_type=''STK''\),
  warning = function\(w\) paste\(''WARNING:'', w$message\),
  error = function\(e\) paste\(''ERROR:'', e$message\)
\)
cat\(''Result:'', iv, ''\\n''\)
cat\(''Class:'', class\(iv\), ''\\n''\)
cat\(''is.nan:'', is.nan\(iv\), ''\\n''\)

cat\(''\\nTest with getImpliedVolOpt directly:\\n''\)
iv2 = tryCatch\(
  getImpliedVolOpt\(type=''Call'', S=12.35, K=18, r=0.04, DTE=50, div=0, price=0.77\),
  warning = function\(w\) paste\(''WARNING:'', w$message\),
  error = function\(e\) paste\(''ERROR:'', e$message\)
\)
cat\(''Result:'', iv2, ''\\n''\)
")

Bash("C:\\Program Files\\R\\R-4.4.3\\bin\\Rscript.exe" -e "
library\(reticulate\)
library\(Tdata\)
cm <- import\(''tdata_py.chains_manager''\)

# Check current cached chain strikes for GDX
chain <- cm$getChain\(''GDX'', tradingClass=''GDX'', force_refresh=FALSE\)
strikes <- chain[[6]]
cat\(''CACHED strikes count:'', length\(strikes\), ''\\n''\)
cat\(''Sample \(first 20\):'', paste\(head\(sort\(unlist\(strikes\)\), 20\), collapse='', ''\), ''\\n''\)
cat\(''Sample \(around 100\):'', paste\(sort\(unlist\(strikes\)\)[sort\(unlist\(strikes\)\) >= 90 & sort\(unlist\(strikes\)\) <= 120], collapse='', ''\), ''\\n''\)
")
